title: STAR - Enigma LLM Cost Optimization
content:
Project: Enigma LLM Inference Cost Optimization

Situation:
- LLM usage costs were scaling rapidly in production, creating pressure to reduce spend without harming response quality.

Task:
- Build a cost-control strategy that preserves quality and SLA targets while lowering monthly inference costs.

Action:
- Introduced model routing to send lower-complexity tasks to smaller or cheaper models.
- Implemented caching strategies to reduce repeated inference calls for semantically similar requests.
- Used task-specific model choices and selective replacement of premium model usage where feasible.
- Balanced latency, quality, and cost with operational monitoring and iterative tuning.

Result:
- Source-reported substantial monthly cost reduction with maintained production quality targets.
- Established repeatable cost-governance patterns for GenAI workloads.
